name: File Explorer
description: Find files and folders on your computer.
author: Aloha Desktop

tools.name: searchFile
tools.description: Search for files in a directory. Never rely on exact match of the keywords, include also common synonyms. For example, use 'insurance proof id card ford car pdf' when user asks for 'ford insurance pdf'.

keywords.description: The keywords present in the file name to search for. For example: when searching for '2025 company reports' use '2025 company firm report' to cover alternative phrasings.

includeHidden.description: Whether to include hidden files and folders in the search results. Default is false. Use only if explicitly asked.

tools.name: searchDirectory
tools.description: Search for directories (folders) in a directory. Never rely on exact match of the keywords, include also common synonyms. For example, use '2025 us tax return form irs refund' to find '2025 tax return' folder.

keywords.description: The keywords present in the directory name to search for. For example: when searching for '2025 company reports' use '2025 company firm report' to cover alternative phrasings.

includeHidden.description: Whether to include hidden files and folders in the search results. Default is false. Use only if explicitly asked.
